rationale: Review 2's sole finding (make antipode_convMul_id private) is a real, grounded api-design improvement that directly cleans the public API of an internal-only lemma; acting on it produces a better PR. Review 1's findings are either minor (simp attr), potentially mis-grounded (antipodeAlgHom claim not in diff/docstring), or likely incorrect (noncomputable marks on defs/instances), so following it would not improve or could degrade the API.
